https://www.dsb.no/
Avvik: 75 | Bestått: 111
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (11 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.726562L4 3.7799L7.06 0.726562L8 1.66656L4 5.66656L0 1.66656L0.94 0.726562Z" fill="currentCo
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="teaser-block__btn" href="/ros-og-beredskap/totalforsvarsaret-2026/"> <span data-hyphenate="">Les mer</span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dsb.mediaflowportal.com/dsbplus/" target="_blank">DSBs mediaportal</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Sikker hverdag

Avvik: 77 | Bestått: 83
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (14 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.726562L4 3.7799L7.06 0.726562L8 1.66656L4 5.66656L0 1.66656L0.94 0.726562Z" fill="currentCo

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<a href="https://dsb.mediaflowportal.com/dsbplus/" target="_blank">DSBs mediaportal</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table class="simple-table responsive-table"> <thead> <tr> <th>Navn</th> <th>Type</th> <th>Tema</th> <th>Publisert</th> <th aria-hidden="true"></th> </tr> </thead> <tbody> <tr> <td data-heading="Navn"
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Navn</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Type</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

MODERATE

Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

MODERATE

Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th aria-hidden="true"></th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (51 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Avvik: 76 | Bestått: 101
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (10 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.google.com/maps/place/Rambergveien+9,+3115+T%C3%B8nsberg,+Norge/@59.2638642,10.4022938,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m5!3m4!1s0x4646b76ad3558ef1:0x3f726fd4acceff7b!8m2!3d59.2638642!4d10.4044
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Sivilforsvaret.no">www.sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Nyhetsvarsling

https://www.dsb.no/nyhetsvarsling/
Avvik: 72 | Bestått: 77
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/om-dsb/personvernerklaring/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Personvernerklæring">DSBs personvernerklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'formdata.email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input data-val="true" data-val-required="DSB.Optimizely.Site.Features.Newsletter.NewsletterFormData.Email-Required" id="FormData_Email" name="FormData.Email" required="" type="email" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'FormData.NewsletterIds' appears 4 times

id="FormData.NewsletterIds"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Elsikkerhet

https://www.dsb.no/elsikkerhet/
Avvik: 76 | Bestått: 104
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (13 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.726562L4 3.7799L7.06 0.726562L8 1.66656L4 5.66656L0 1.66656L0.94 0.726562Z" fill="currentCo
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>

Personvernerklæring

https://www.dsb.no/om-dsb/personvernerklaring/
Avvik: 70 | Bestått: 94
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.datatilsynet.no/rettigheter-og-plikter/den-registrertes-rettigheter/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Datatilsynet">På datatilsynets hjemmeside kan du lese mer om dine retti
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Søk

https://www.dsb.no/sok/
Avvik: 71 | Bestått: 70
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dsb.mediaflowportal.com/dsbplus/" target="_blank">DSBs mediaportal</a>

Høringer

https://www.dsb.no/horinger/
Avvik: 74 | Bestått: 75
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (11 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="transport-teaser__heading">Høringer</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dsb.mediaflowportal.com/dsbplus/" target="_blank">DSBs mediaportal</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Regelverk

https://www.dsb.no/regelverk/
Avvik: 69 | Bestått: 77
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dsb.mediaflowportal.com/dsbplus/" target="_blank">DSBs mediaportal</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Produkter og forbrukertjenester

https://www.dsb.no/produkter-og-forbrukertjenester/
Avvik: 75 | Bestått: 98
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (13 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Elanlegg på fiskefartøy og lasteskip under 15 meter</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Bibliotek

https://www.dsb.no/bibliotek/
Avvik: 70 | Bestått: 72
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://asp.bibliotekservice.no/dsb/search.aspx" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="DSBs bibliotek">Her kan du søkje i bibliotekbasen til DSB (blir opna i nytt vindauge)</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a href="https://dsb.mediaflowportal.com/dsbplus/" target="_blank">DSBs mediaportal</a>

Statistikk

https://www.dsb.no/statistikk/
Avvik: 75 | Bestått: 89
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (12 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="transport-teaser__heading">Omkomne i brann</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dsb.mediaflowportal.com/dsbplus/" target="_blank">DSBs mediaportal</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="sitemap"> <ul class="sitemap__list"> <li> <a href="/aktuelt/">Aktuelt</a> <ul class="sitemap__list"> <li> <a href="/aktuelt/totalforsvarsaret-apnet-av-h.m.-kong-harald">Totalforsvarsåret å
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>

Tilsyn

https://www.dsb.no/tilsyn/
Avvik: 69 | Bestått: 91
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dsb.mediaflowportal.com/dsbplus/" target="_blank">DSBs mediaportal</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Nødnett

https://www.dsb.no/nodnett/
Avvik: 74 | Bestått: 92
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (11 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.brsk.no/" target="_blank" title="Brann- og redningsskolen">Brsk.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dsb.mediaflowportal.com/dsbplus/" target="_blank">DSBs mediaportal</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

https://www.dsb.no/vedtak/
Avvik: 74 | Bestått: 96
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-teaser__heading"> <a class="article-teaser__link" href="/vedtak/samtykke-til-bygging-av-co2-terminal-pa-sjursoya-i-oslo-kommune/">Samtykke til bygging av CO2-terminal på Sjursøya i
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (164 characters)

<a class="article-teaser__link" href="/vedtak/samtykke-til-bygging-av-anlegg-for-oppgradering-og-flytendegjoring-av-biogass-samt-lagring-av-flytende-biogass-i-krogstad-miljopark-i-djupedalen-lillestro
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (158 characters)

<a class="article-teaser__link" href="/vedtak/samtykke-til-idriftsettelse-av-produksjonsanlegg-for-handtering-av-farlig-stoff-i-forbindelse-med-fremstilling-av-sjeldne-jordartsmetaller-i-porsgrunn-kom

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (101 characters)

<a class="article-teaser__link" href="/vedtak/samtykke-til-bygging-av-produksjonsanlegg-for-flytende-biogass-pa-raudemel-hornindal-i-volda-kommune/">Samtykke til bygging av produksjonsanlegg for flyte
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'gå til side 2'

<a aria-label="gå til side 2" class="pagination__link" href="/vedtak/?page=2"> 2 </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Jobb i DSB

https://www.dsb.no/om-dsb/jobb-i-dsb/
Avvik: 75 | Bestått: 102
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (10 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="article-header__cta-link" href="https://jobb.dsb.no/search/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Se alle ledige stillinger</span> <svg fill="none" height="24"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="teaser-block__btn" href="/om-dsb/jobb-i-dsb/dsb-som-arbeidsplass/"> <span data-hyphenate="">Les mer</span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="teaser-block__btn" href="/om-dsb/jobb-i-dsb/hvorfor-velge-dsb-som-arbeidsgiver/"> <span data-hyphenate="">Les mer</span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.sivilforsvaret.no/" target="_blank">Sivilforsvaret.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://farligeprodukter.no/" target="_blank">Farligeprodukter.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nodvarsel.no/" target="_blank">Nødvarsel.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (2 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 2 pages]
Avvik: 13 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text (×2 across article pages)

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/system/logo/dsb__logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×16 across article pages)

<svg fill="none" height="6" viewbox="0 0 8 6" width="8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0.94 0.683105L4 3.73644L7.06 0.683105L8 1.62311L4 5.62311L0 1.62311L0.94 0.683105Z" fill="currentC
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1 (×2 across article pages)

<h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3 (×1 across article pages)

<h3 class="article-teaser__heading"> <a class="article-teaser__link" href="/aktuelt/totalforsvarsaret-apnet-av-h.m.-kong-harald">Totalforsvarsåret åpnet av H.M. Kong Harald</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×2 across article pages)

<nav class="main-menu" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="main-menu__open" data-menu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold' (×2 across article pages)

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedmeny' (×2 across article pages)

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#menu">Gå til hovedmeny</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'gå til side 2' (×1 across article pages)

<a aria-label="gå til side 2" class="pagination__link" href="/aktuelt/?page=2"> 2 </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'gå til side 3' (×1 across article pages)

<a aria-label="gå til side 3" class="pagination__link" href="/aktuelt/?page=3"> 3 </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'gå til side 4' (×1 across article pages)

<a aria-label="gå til side 4" class="pagination__link" href="/aktuelt/?page=4"> 4 </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'gå til side 5' (×1 across article pages)

<a aria-label="gå til side 5" class="pagination__link" href="/aktuelt/?page=5"> 5 </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×12 across article pages)

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/262d5de7-78f2-4199-915e-ab294d727518" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span data-hyphenate="">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container (×104 across article pages)

<a class="main-menu__sub-item-link hyphenate" href="/brannsikkerhet/"> <span data-hyphenate="">Brannsikkerhet</span> </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://dsb.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://dsb.no --max-pages 20 --format html
